title: sorbus umbellata
intro: Sorbus umbellata, also known as the American mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is often used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sorbus umbellata include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Sorbus umbellata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
